heading: Biodiesel fuel use credits
label: 13220 Biodiesel fuel use credits

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall allocate one credit under this section to a fleet or covered person for each qualifying volume of the biodiesel component of fuel containing at least 20 percent biodiesel by volume purchased after the date of the enactment of this section, for use by the fleet or covered person in vehicles owned or operated by the fleet or covered person that weigh more than 8,500 pounds gross vehicle weight rating.

children.label: A
children.text: for use in alternative fueled vehicles; or

children.label: B
children.text: that is required by Federal or State law.

children.heading: Authority to modify percentage
children.label: 3 Authority to modify percentage
children.text: The Secretary may, by rule, lower the 20 percent biodiesel volume requirement in paragraph (1) for reasons related to cold start, safety, or vehicle function considerations.

children.heading: Documentation
children.label: 4 Documentation
children.text: A fleet or covered person seeking a credit under this section shall provide written documentation to the Secretary supporting the allocation of a credit to such fleet or covered person under paragraph (1).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: At the request of a fleet or covered person allocated a credit under subsection (a), the Secretary shall, for the year in which the purchase of a qualifying volume is made, treat that purchase as the acquisition of one alternative fueled vehicle the fleet or covered person is required to acquire under this subchapter, subchapter II, or subchapter III.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 2 Limitation
children.text: Credits allocated under subsection (a) may not be used to satisfy more than 50 percent of the alternative fueled vehicle requirements of a fleet or covered person under this subchapter, subchapter II, and subchapter III. This paragraph shall not apply to a fleet or covered person that is a biodiesel alternative fuel provider described in .section 13251(a)(2)(A) of this title

children.heading: Credit not a section 13258 credit
children.label: c Credit not a section 13258 credit
children.text: A credit under this section shall not be considered a credit under .section 13258 of this title

children.heading: Issuance of rule
children.label: d Issuance of rule
children.text: The Secretary shall, before , issue a rule establishing procedures for the implementation of this section.January 1, 1999

children.heading: Collection of data
children.label: e Collection of data
children.text: The Secretary shall collect such data as are required to make a determination described in subsection (f)(2)(B).

children.label: A
children.text: means a diesel fuel substitute produced from nonpetroleum renewable resources that meets the registration requirements for fuels and fuel additives established by the Environmental Protection Agency under ;section 7545 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: animal wastes, including poultry fats and poultry wastes, and other waste materials; or

children.label: ii
children.text: municipal solid waste and sludges and oils derived from wastewater and the treatment of wastewater; and

children.label: B
children.text: if the Secretary determines by rule that the average annual alternative fuel use in light duty vehicles by fleets and covered persons exceeds 450 gallons or gallon equivalents, the amount of such average annual alternative fuel use.
